surfaces.label: Admin Dashboard
surfaces.purpose: Show admin-level summary of assignments, returned items, evidence status, delta status and blocked publish actions.

surfaces.label: Admin Article Inventory
surfaces.purpose: Browse all article candidates and readiness records at Admin planning level.

surfaces.label: Assignment Control Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan Admin assignment of new draft tasks or existing article edits to Editor.

surfaces.label: Editor Return Review Panel
surfaces.purpose: Review work sent back by Editor with notes, reference status, attribution status and layout status.

surfaces.label: Evidence Review Panel
surfaces.purpose: Review Admin approval evidence, source status, image credit status, layout status and editorial notes.

surfaces.label: Delta Review Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan before/after file delta review before any later controlled static apply path.

surfaces.label: Return for Correction Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan Admin return of item to Editor with structured correction notes.

surfaces.label: Archive Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan Admin archive decision for unsuitable or deferred candidates.

surfaces.label: Publish Decision Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan Admin publish and publish-and-close decisions as blocked/non-executable actions until a later approved controlled publishing path.

surfaces.label: Tool Approval Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan Admin approval of editor tool use for assigned articles, including images, graphs, tables, infographics and diagrams.

surfaces.label: Audit and Notes Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan audit trail fields for Admin decisions, evidence notes, return notes and closure notes.

surfaces.label: Admin Status Summary Panel
surfaces.purpose: Show planned non-runtime status for assigned, returned, archived, internally cleared and blocked-for-publish items.
